    BREAD(<img src="../../assets/images/cooking/bread.webp" width="50"/>)

    POT1(<img src="../../assets/images/cooking/pot.webp" width="50"/>)
    STEAK(<img src="../../assets/images/cooking/steak.webp" width="50"/>)

    STEAKSUB(<img src="../../assets/images/cooking/steakSub.webp" width="50"/>)

    FLOUR ==> OVEN
    OVEN ==> BREAD
    BEEF ==> POT1
    POT1 ==> STEAK
    MILK ==> POT2
    POT2 ==> CHEESE
    BREAD ==> POT3
    STEAK ==> POT3
    CHEESE ==> POT3
    POT3 ==> STEAKSUB

    click FLOUR "../flour"
    click OVEN "../oven"
    click BREAD "../bread"
    click MILK "../milk"
    click POT1 "../pot"
    click CHEESE "../cheese"
    click BEEF "../beef"
    click POT2 "../pot"
    click STEAK "../steak"
    click POT3 "../pot"
    click STEAKSUB "../steakSub"
